EmailTemplate.name: AES - Onboarding Pack
EmailTemplate.subject: Let's get you Onboarded with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
LET'S GET YOU ONBOARDED.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Everything is looking good so far! Next step is to get your certificates and other compliance documents added to your Alliance Profile.
START ONBOARDING
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
